title: notebook-auto-clear input spec
description:
Inputs to ``notebook-auto-clear`` — all paths / ids are caller-declared.

``source`` / ``template`` are ``.py`` relpaths under the experiment dir (or
absolute), parsed by the same percent-format parser. ``input_roots`` /
``source_roots`` are the OPAQUE roots the server-side lint recompute needs (a
missing path literal under ``input_roots`` flags its section, keeping it out
of the auto-clear). There is deliberately NO ``receipt`` field (T10): render
receipts are read from the journal (sha-fresh only), never trusted from the
caller — see the module docstring.

audit_id.description: The notebook decision-journal scope id (filesystem-safe slug) the auto-clear records are appended to (journal lives at .hpc/notebooks/<audit_id>.decisions.jsonl). Caller-authored.
audit_id.title: Audit Id

source.description: Experiment-relative path to the audited source .py (jupytext percent format). Section shas are recomputed fresh; an auto-clear binds the recomputed sha, never a caller-asserted one.
source.title: Source

template.description: Experiment-relative path to the template .py. A section auto-clears only when it is byte-identical (inherited) to its template section.
template.title: Template

input_roots.description: OPAQUE data-path roots the server-side lint recompute tests path literals against. A section with a missing literal is flagged and therefore NOT auto-cleared.
input_roots.title: Input Roots

source_roots.description: OPAQUE import roots the server-side lint recompute resolves imports under.
source_roots.title: Source Roots
